title: Solid Foundations
description: Lower body strength with squats and lunges followed by a dynamic and static core block

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Jumping jacks
exercises.instructions: Jump spreading arms and legs, return feet together

exercises.name: World's greatest stretch
exercises.instructions: Lunge + torso rotation + arm to the sky

exercises.name: Moderate high knees
exercises.instructions: Knees to chest at a moderate pace

exercises.name: 1.5 squats
exercises.instructions: Lower, come up halfway, lower again, come up fully

exercises.name: Bulgarian split squats
exercises.instructions: Back foot on a chair, lower the knee

exercises.name: Floor hip thrust
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, feet flat, lift hips, squeeze glutes

exercises.name: Side plank
exercises.instructions: On one forearm, body aligned, hips high

exercises.name: Leg raises
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, lift extended legs to vertical

exercises.name: Dead bug
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, arms and legs up, extend opposite arm/leg alternating

exercises.name: Hamstring stretch
exercises.instructions: Leg extended forward, lean torso forward

exercises.name: Pigeon stretch
exercises.instructions: Front leg bent in front, back leg extended, lean forward

exercises.name: Cat-cow
exercises.instructions: On all fours, alternate cat and cow, breathe

exercises.name: Child's pose
exercises.instructions: Kneeling, arms extended forward, forehead on the floor, breathe deeply
